candidateName: Search bar loses focus after every keystroke on macOS Safari 17.2
summary: Bug report about search bar focus loss on macOS Safari 17.2. Severity-medium, affects the search-v3 feature currently in sprint. Reported by 4 users in last 24 hours.
notes: Repro: open search, type three characters, focus lost after second character, search input collapses. Sprint goal: zero-regression search UX shipping to beta this week.
